Class TableOfContentsCustomizer

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.tableofcontents.TableOfContentsCustomizer
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRITableOfContentsCustomizer, Serializable
public class TableOfContentsCustomizer extends Object implements DRITableOfContentsCustomizer

TableOfContentsCustomizer class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca, Jan Moxter
